title: Transitional Housing
subtitle: Shared Supportive Living
description: Safe, stable housing with community guidelines and case management. Our transitional housing provides women with a supportive environment where they can focus on rebuilding their lives with dignity and respect.

title: Employment Readiness & Job Navigation
subtitle: Career Development Support
description: Resume help, job search coaching, workplace skills, and employer referrals. We help women develop the skills and confidence needed to secure and maintain stable employment.

title: Life Skills Workshops & Peer Mentoring
subtitle: Personal Development
description: Goal-setting, budgeting, wellness, communication, and conflict resolution. Our workshops and peer mentoring provide practical skills for daily life and personal growth.

title: Family Reunification Support
subtitle: Rebuilding Family Connections
description: Navigation for visitations, parenting resources, and reunification planning. We support women in rebuilding and strengthening their family relationships.

title: Resource Referrals
subtitle: Community Connections
description: Legal aid, Medi-Cal, childcare, transportation, and mental health providers. We connect women with essential community resources and services.
